violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and toilet room were lacking proper signage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2025
